name: Roger Woodward
abstract: Roger Robert Woodward  (born 20 December 1942) is an Australian classical pianist, composer, conductor, teacher and human rights activist. He is widely regarded as a leading advocate of contemporary music.

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Baker
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee (Tom Baker) does not mention Roger Woodward; the interviewer mentions Woodward as part of a tour story involving Rolf Harris and James Morrison.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Baker interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 13, 1997
